homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track creates an irresistible atmosphere with catchy melodies and infectious beats that encourage dancing all night long. Electronic synthesizers and deep rhythms drive the energy, while subtle elements like cymbals and bass add texture to the mix. The combination of groovy instrumentation and mesmerizing flows ensures the music keeps listeners engaged from start to finish.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track serves as a romantic or dramatic piece for a movie soundtrack, driven by a steady drumming rhythm and emotional keyboard accompaniment. The music features an energetic piano melody and strong bass line that create a youthful and engaging atmosphere suitable for scenes involving heartbreak. With its electronic pop influences and pulsating beat, the song blends cinematic storytelling with a lively dance groove.

The track maintains a steady, heavy mood throughout, emphasizing an unsettling and immersive listening experience.
